search.idle: Type a query to search modules, glossary entries, and tags.
search.error: Search is temporarily unavailable. The index could not be loaded.

searchEntry.title: Search
searchEntry.description: Search Model Atlas by title, alias, or tag. Use the search control to jump to modules, concepts, and glossary entries.
searchEntry.canonicalNote: Canonical search entry URL: /search. Query handoffs may append ?q=<term>; tag handoffs may append ?tag=<slug> or ?classification=<id-or-slug> (for example /search?classification=activation).
searchEntry.classificationScopeDescription: Showing results scoped to the {classification} classification.

timelinePage.title: Timeline
timelinePage.description: Browse how things change over time.
timelinePage.errorDescription: The interactive timeline could not load, but the dated event list below still works.
timelinePage.emptyDescription: No dated events are available for {classification}.

home.title: Model Atlas
home.subtitle: A field guide to modern AI models and modules
home.intro: Model Atlas is a documentation-native reference for transformers, attention variants, training methods, and the systems around them.
home.atlasLinkDescription: Start with a page that explains where models, modules, concepts, glossary entries, tags, and architecture pages fit together.
home.gqaLinkDescription: An attention variant that shrinks KV cache costs by letting several query heads share fewer key-value heads.
home.swigluLinkDescription: A gated feed-forward variant that replaces a plain activation with a learned gate and SiLU path.
home.reluLinkDescription: A simple activation function page that gives a lightweight entry point into module basics.

browseIndex.title: Browse the Atlas
browseIndex.description: Start from the kind of thing you already know: a model, a module, a concept, or a glossary term. This page points you to the right part of the reference and gives a few strong starting pages.
browseIndex.quickRoutesDescription: Use these entry points when you know how you want to explore, but not the exact page yet.
browseIndex.searchRouteDescription: Jump straight to a title, alias, or tag when you already have a term in mind.
browseIndex.glossaryRouteDescription: Scan short definitions when you need to decode unfamiliar language fast.
browseIndex.architectureRouteDescription: Follow model-family structure, positional schemes, and other system-shape ideas.
browseIndex.tagsRouteDescription: Browse curated topic labels that cut across models, modules, concepts, and glossary pages.
browseIndex.modelsSectionDescription: Model pages explain a concrete model family or checkpoint line, what architecture it uses, and which modules matter most before you go deeper.
browseIndex.modulesSectionDescription: Module pages break down the moving parts inside a model, such as attention variants, feed-forward blocks, normalization layers, tokenizers, and positional embeddings.
browseIndex.conceptsSectionDescription: Concept pages explain broader ideas that span many models or modules, such as transformer structure, quantization, or long-context tradeoffs.
browseIndex.papersSectionDescription: Paper pages distill one publication into the models, modules, training methods, and systems it introduces or strengthens.
browseIndex.trainingSectionDescription: Training pages focus on the named regimes and post-training methods that shape model behavior beyond the base architecture.
browseIndex.systemsSectionDescription: System pages explain the runtime and serving machinery around models, such as KV-cache handling, distributed overlap, and deployment-oriented data flow.
browseIndex.modelTypesSectionDescription: Model-type glossary pages explain model families and structural roles such as encoders, decoders, and generative or multimodal setups.
browseIndex.inferenceSectionDescription: Inference glossary pages cover decoding, sampling controls, runtime latency, and inference-time optimizations such as KV cache and quantization.
browseIndex.moduleComponentsSectionDescription: Module-component glossary pages explain building blocks such as activations, normalization, embeddings, residual paths, and the tensors and logits that flow through model layers.
browseIndex.glossarySectionDescription: Glossary pages define the vocabulary around model architecture, training, inference, and evaluation so the rest of the atlas reads more naturally.

topologyBrowse.descriptionTemplate: A prototype ontology view for {classification}, derived from the shared classification layer and opened directly from the URL state.

classificationSummaries.activationFunctions: Activation functions shape how each layer transforms values after a linear map.
classificationSummaries.attentionMechanisms: Attention modules decide which earlier tokens each position can read from.
classificationSummaries.feedForwardNetworks: Feed-forward blocks apply position-wise transformations after attention.
classificationSummaries.normalizationLayers: Normalization layers rescale activations so training stays stable across depth.
classificationSummaries.positionEncodingMethods: Positional embedding modules represent token order, distance, or the absence of an explicit position signal inside the model.
classificationSummaries.tokenizationMethods: Tokenizer modules convert raw text, bytes, or image patches into discrete units the model can consume.
classificationSummaries.transformerBlockStructures: Transformer block modules describe how attention, feed-forward, and residual paths are wired together.

topologyBrowse.classificationSelectorDescription: Browse module-oriented ontology branches without leaving the selected topology surface.
topologyBrowse.graphMapDescription: This graph-map prototype renders the generated classification tree for the selected branch so reviewers can inspect nested module ownership before the full graph renderer is connected.
topologyBrowse.timelineDescription: This timeline prototype renders the same generated classification tree with timeline ordering so reviewers can inspect the selected branch through a time-oriented surface.
topologyBrowse.invalidDescription: The requested classification or surface mode is not available for this prototype. Choose one of the valid topology links below.
topologyBrowse.emptyDescription: No eligible seed classifications currently have published members for the topology prototype.

modelsIndex.title: Models
modelsIndex.description: Published model pages that explain concrete model families and checkpoints, along with the architectures and modules they rely on.
modelsIndex.emptyDescription: Published model pages will appear here once they are added to the atlas. Return home or open Browse the Atlas to explore modules, concepts, and glossary pages in the meantime.

modulesIndex.title: Modules
modulesIndex.description: Published module pages covering attention variants, feed-forward blocks, normalization layers, positional schemes, and other reusable building blocks.
modulesIndex.emptyDescription: Published module pages will appear here once they are added to the atlas. Return home or open Browse the Atlas to explore related concepts and glossary pages in the meantime.

conceptsIndex.title: Concepts
conceptsIndex.description: Published concept pages that explain broader ideas spanning many models and modules, such as architecture patterns, quantization, and long-context tradeoffs.
conceptsIndex.emptyDescription: Published concept pages will appear here once they are added to the atlas. Return home or open Browse the Atlas to explore models, modules, and glossary pages in the meantime.

papersIndex.title: Papers
papersIndex.description: Published paper pages that break one report or publication into its main claims, linked entities, and supporting sources.
papersIndex.emptyDescription: Published paper pages will appear here once they are added to the atlas. Return home or open Browse the Atlas to explore models, modules, and concepts in the meantime.

trainingIndex.title: Training
trainingIndex.description: Published training-regime pages covering pretraining, post-training, distillation, quantization-aware training, and related optimization methods.
trainingIndex.emptyDescription: Published training-regime pages will appear here once they are added to the atlas. Return home or open Browse the Atlas to explore models, modules, and papers in the meantime.

systemsIndex.title: Systems
systemsIndex.description: Published system pages covering inference, serving, runtime, and operational designs that support modern model stacks.
systemsIndex.emptyDescription: Published system pages will appear here once they are added to the atlas. Return home or open Browse the Atlas to explore models, modules, and papers in the meantime.

glossaryIndex.title: Glossary
glossaryIndex.description: Defined machine-learning terms with short summaries. Each entry links to a canonical glossary page when published.
glossaryIndex.emptyDescription: Published glossary pages will appear here once they are added to the reference. Return home or open search to explore modules and tags in the meantime.

architectureIndex.title: Architecture
architectureIndex.description: Architecture-related concepts, model families, and component patterns. Each entry links to a canonical docs page when published.
architectureIndex.emptyDescription: Published architecture concept pages and pages under the architecture content grouping will appear here. Return home or open search to explore modules and tags in the meantime.

blogIndex.title: Blog
blogIndex.description: Narrative posts that connect releases and serving concepts back to canonical reference pages.
blogIndex.emptyDescription: Published narrative posts will appear here once they are added to the atlas. Return home or open search to explore models, modules, and concepts in the meantime.

topologyPrototype.title: Topology
topologyPrototype.description: Topology relationships across published classifications, concepts, and modules.
topologyPrototype.chipHint: Toggle one or more classifications to constrain the graph and URL.
topologyPrototype.loadingDescription: The topology surface reserves a loading region before the graph data is ready.
topologyPrototype.emptyDescription: The topology surface reserves an empty region for classifications without visible members.
topologyPrototype.emptyNoSelectionDescription: Select at least one classification or return to the default activation view.
topologyPrototype.errorDescription: The topology surface reserves an error region for recoverable classification or graph-data failures.
topologyPrototype.successDescription: The default prototype starts with activation, activation-function, and feed-forward selected.
topologyPrototype.membershipLegendDescription: links a selected classification to visible records.
topologyPrototype.relationshipLegendDescription: is a typed ontology relationship between records.
topologyPrototype.detailPanelHint: Select a node or relationship to inspect its details.
topologyPrototype.detailPanelEmptyDescription: Use the graph, node list, or relationship list to inspect one item at a time.
topologyPrototype.detailMissingSummary: No localized summary is available for this record yet.

tagsIndex.title: Tags
tagsIndex.description: Controlled tags for browsing topics across modules, concepts, models, and glossary pages. Each tag links to a landing page listing every published resource with that tag.

tagLanding.emptyTitle: No published resources for this tag yet
tagLanding.emptyDescription: When docs pages or blog posts are tagged with this label, they will appear here grouped by kind. Return home, browse all tags, or open search to explore related topics.
